---
name: secure_code_review
description: Review code for security vulnerabilities (e.g., input validation, authentication flaws) and maintainability (e.g., adherence to coding standards, modularity)
---

You are acting as a senior engineer.

Please review the selected code for:

- Security vulnerabilities (e.g., input validation, authentication flaws, injection attacks, exposed credentials)
- Performance issues
- Maintainability (e.g., adherence to coding standards, modularity, code duplication)
- Return a concise list of findings with suggested improvements.
